auth.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email before running a prediction (a verification email has been sent)

auth.verifyPageFailed: Verification failed, the link may have expired

Your verification code is: {code}

Valid for 10 minutes. If this wasn't you, please ignore this email.

placeholder.migrationDesc: This page is being migrated from Vue to React. Stay tuned.

meta.title: SuperFish - Predict Everything
meta.description: SuperFish - Social Media Opinion Simulation System

home.heroDesc: From a single document, {brand} extracts reality seeds to auto-generate a parallel world with up to {agentScale}. Inject variables from a god's-eye view to find the {optimalSolution} in complex group dynamics.
home.slogan: Let Agents rehearse the future, let decisions prevail
home.systemReadyDesc: Prediction engine on standby. Upload unstructured data to initialize a simulation sequence.
home.step01Desc: Seed extraction & memory injection & GraphRAG construction
home.step02Desc: Entity extraction & persona generation & Agent config injection
home.step03Desc: Dual-platform parallel sim & auto-parse requirements & temporal memory
home.step04Desc: ReportAgent interacts with the post-simulation environment via rich tools
home.step05Desc: Chat with any simulated individual & converse with ReportAgent
home.promptPlaceholder: // Describe your simulation or prediction requirement in natural language
home.heroPill: AI swarm simulation · See the future of every decision
home.uploadHint: Drag your files in, or click to choose
home.promptLabel: What do you want to simulate?
home.flow1Desc: Upload a report, news, or a paragraph as the seed of the simulation
home.flow2Desc: AI spins up a parallel world where thousands of agents truly interact
home.flow3Desc: Sentiment trends, crowd reactions, worst cases — clear before it happens
home.guideSub: Tell us about something you're worried or curious about that hasn't happened yet. AI brings in thousands of virtual people and plays out what comes next — before it does.
home.askPlaceholder: e.g. If we raise our prices by 20%, how will loyal users react?
home.addMaterialTitle: Add a related file to make it more accurate
home.addMaterialHint: News, reports, screenshots, chat logs (PDF / MD / TXT)
home.ctaNeedAsk: First, tell us what you want to predict
home.ctaNeedFile: Add one file to get started
home.chatAskTopic: I can play out a decision you haven't made yet, so you can move with confidence. So — what are you weighing up?
home.chatEg1: I want to ask my boss for a raise 💰
home.chatEg2: Launching a new feature — will users love it? 🚀
home.chatEg3: About to close a big client 🤝
home.chatEg5: Thinking of running a product pre-sale
home.chatInputPlaceholder: In one sentence, what do you want to predict…
home.chatAskMaterial: Got it. Now show me a related file — news, a report, a screenshot, chat logs, anything. It helps me stay close to reality.
home.chatUploadHint: Drag it in, or click to choose (PDF / MD / TXT)
home.chatSampleHint: No file handy? Tap a sample and I'll run with it
home.samplePressBody:
[Launch] SuperFish Pro is live

Hi everyone — we're thrilled to announce that SuperFish Pro launches today.

Key upgrades:
- 3x faster predictions
- New multiplayer simulation
- Export the full simulation report

Limited-time offer: 50% off your first month, plus 30 bonus days for existing users.

Upgrade now and play out every important decision before you make it.
home.sampleChatBody:
Customer: This price increase is way too steep, isn't it?
Me: I understand your concern — it's mainly driven by rising costs, and we've added quite a few new features too.
Customer: I don't need the new features for now. Can I keep the old price?
Me: Tell you what — as a long-time customer, let me request a transition discount for you.
Customer: I'll think about it. Honestly, I'm half tempted to switch to a competitor.
Me: No rush — let me put together a proposal and send it over. Reach out anytime.
home.sampleResearchBody:
Competitor research brief (Q2 2026)

Competitor A: 20% cheaper, but limited features and slow support.
Competitor B: Feature-comparable to us, focused on enterprise, recently closed a new funding round.
Competitor C: Free + premium model, fast user growth, polarizing reviews.

Opportunity: small teams clearly want "lightweight + great value."
Risk: Competitor B may ship collaboration features first.
Recommendation: accelerate our collaboration feature and double down on the value story.
home.chatNeedFile: Add one file first so I can begin
home.chatReady: All set. Tap below and I'll play it out for you 🔮
home.noHistory: Nothing here yet — go predict something first

main.noPendingFiles: No pending materials found. Go back to the home page to re-upload and enter your prediction request. (Note: refreshing this page clears the selected materials.) Redirecting to home…
main.buildInterrupted: The graph build task was lost and the build may have been interrupted (usually due to a backend restart). Please start a new build from the home page.
main.quotaHint: To guarantee compute for each run, one account can run at most {limit} simulations at once. When full, wait for one to finish (or end it early on its run page) before starting another.

step1.ontologyDesc: LLM analyzes document content and simulation requirements, extracts reality seeds, and auto-generates a suitable ontology structure
step1.graphRagDesc: Based on the generated ontology, documents are auto-chunked and processed into a knowledge graph, extracting entities and relations, forming temporal memory and community summaries
step1.buildCompleteDesc: Graph build is complete. Proceed to the next step for simulation environment setup.
step1.rebuildGraphHint: Re-extract and rebuild the graph (recover stuck or unsatisfactory results)
step1.rebuildEnvHint: Discard the existing simulation environment and build a fresh one from the current graph
step1.rebuildEnvConfirm: This will create a brand-new simulation environment from the current graph; the existing one will not be reused. Continue?
step1.cReading: SuperFish is getting to know your world
step1.cReadingSub: Reading your material, learning the people and events in it…
step1.cUnderstanding: Sorting out who's who and how they connect
step1.cRoles: It found these kinds of characters in your world
step1.cRelations: and the kinds of connections between them
step1.cBackstageHint: Technical details and raw logs — you rarely need these

step2.simInstanceDesc: Create a new simulation instance and pull world parameter templates
step2.generateAgentPersonaDesc: Combine context to auto-extract entities and relations from the knowledge graph, initialize simulated individuals, and assign unique behaviors and memories based on reality seeds
step2.cGatheringSub: AI is giving each one a personality, background and memory…
step2.cNext: Next: let them play it out
step2.quotaFullBody: You already have {running}/{limit} simulations running. To guarantee compute for each one, an account can run at most {limit} at once. Wait for one to finish, or click “end early” on its run page, then come back to start this one.
step2.cBackstageHint: Environment params, platform algorithms, raw logs — rarely needed
step2.dualPlatformConfigDesc: LLM intelligently sets world time flow, recommendation algorithms, each individual's active hours, posting frequency, event triggers, and more based on requirements and reality seeds
step2.initialActivationDesc: Auto-generate initial activation events and hot topics based on narrative direction to guide the simulation world's initial state
step2.setupCompleteDesc: Simulation environment is ready. You can now start the simulation.
step2.roundsConfigDesc: SuperFish auto-plans to simulate {hours} real-world hours, each round representing {minutesPerRound} minutes of elapsed time
step2.customTip: For first-time runs, we strongly recommend switching to 'Custom Mode' to reduce rounds for a quick preview and lower error risk
step2.personaDimExperienceDesc: Complete behavioral trajectory in this event
step2.personaDimEmpty: No content for this dimension yet
step2.regenerateEnvHint: Regenerate agent profiles and platform config
step2.cPeopleWall: The {count} people we gathered for you
step2.cSeeStage: Details shown on the stage above

step3.oldSimCleared: Old simulation logs cleared, restarting simulation
step3.preparingGoBack: Preparing to return to Step 2, closing simulation...
step3.closeFailed: Failed to close simulation environment, attempting force stop...
step3.stopConfirmDesc: The simulation will stop immediately. Generated actions and results are kept, and you can proceed to generate the report.
step3.cActing: They're acting it out for you
step3.cActingSub: The virtual people are posting, liking, arguing and influencing each other…
step3.cWaiting: They're stepping on stage, starting soon…
step3.cBackstageHint: Per-platform rounds, process, raw logs — rarely needed

step4.panelKeyFacts: Latest key facts from temporal memory
step4.regenerateReportHint: Discard the current report and regenerate
step4.cWritingSub: AI is reading through the whole run and distilling what matters to you
step4.cDoneSub: Here's the judgment from this run
step4.cBackstageHint: Generation progress, agent log, console output — rarely needed

step5.chatWithAgent: Chat with any individual in the world
step5.reportAgentDesc: A conversational version of the report generation agent with access to 4 professional tools and SuperFish's complete memory
step5.toolInsightForgeDesc: Aligns real-world seed data with simulation state, combining Global/Local Memory for cross-temporal deep attribution analysis
step5.toolPanoramaSearchDesc: Graph-based BFS algorithm that reconstructs event propagation paths, capturing the full topology of information flow
step5.toolQuickSearchDesc: GraphRAG-based instant query interface with optimized indexing for fast extraction of node attributes and discrete facts
step5.toolInterviewSubAgentDesc: Autonomous interviews that conduct parallel multi-round dialogues with simulated individuals, collecting unstructured opinion data and psychological states
step5.chatEmptyReportAgent: Anything you want to ask about this conclusion? Go ahead.
step5.chatEmptyAgent: Curious what “{name}” thinks? Just ask them.
step5.surveyInputPlaceholder: Type the question you want to ask everyone…
step5.inputPlaceholder: Type your question, Enter to send
step5.surveyPlaceholder: Type the question you want to ask these people
step5.selectAgentFirst: Please select a simulated individual first
step5.reportAgentTagline: Helps you make sense of this conclusion
step5.exReportC: Would a different approach change the outcome?
step5.exAgentA: Why did you think that at the time?
step5.cSubtitle: Read the conclusion — anything else on your mind?
step5.cPickPrompt: Who do you want to ask? Pick one.
step5.cCrowdPlaceholder: What do you want to ask everyone?
step5.cAgentUnavailable: This run has ended, so you can't reach them directly — ask SuperFish instead, it remembers everything.
step5.cWaking: Bringing the virtual people back (restoring memory)…

graph.graphMemoryRealtime: GraphRAG short/long-term memory updating in real-time
graph.pendingContentHint: Some content is still processing. Consider refreshing the graph manually later.
graph.noDataDesc: The graph visualization will appear here after graph construction completes

history.title: My predictions
history.replayHint: “Run” and “Ask” happen live and can't be replayed from history
history.deleteConfirmDesc: This permanently deletes the project and its graph, simulation and report data. This cannot be undone.

api.projectDeleteFailed: Project not found or deletion failed: {id}
api.requireFileUpload: Please upload at least one document file
api.noDocProcessed: No documents were processed successfully. Please check file formats.
api.ontologyNotGenerated: Ontology not yet generated. Please call /ontology/generate first.
api.graphBuilding: Graph build in progress. Do not resubmit. To force rebuild, add force: true.
api.graphBuildStarted: Graph build task started. Query progress via /task/{taskId}.
api.graphNotBuilt: Graph not yet built. Please call /api/graph/build first.
api.prepareStarted: Preparation task started. Query progress via /api/simulation/prepare/status.
api.alreadyPrepared: Preparation already complete. No need to regenerate.
api.configNotFound: Simulation config not found. Please call /prepare first.
api.configFileNotFound: Config file not found. Please call /prepare first.
api.maxRoundsPositive: max_rounds must be a positive integer
api.maxRoundsInvalid: max_rounds must be a valid integer
api.simRunningForceHint: Simulation is running. Stop it first via /stop, or use force=true to restart.
api.simNotReady: Simulation not ready. Current status: {status}. Please call /prepare first.
api.graphIdRequiredForMemory: Graph memory update requires a valid graph_id. Ensure the graph is built.
api.dbNotExist: Database does not exist. The simulation may not have run yet.
api.missingGraphIdEnsure: Missing graph ID. Please ensure the graph has been built.
api.reportGenerateStarted: Report generation task started. Query progress via /api/report/generate/status.
api.noReportForSim: No report found for this simulation: {id}
api.reportProgressNotAvail: Report not found or progress unavailable: {id}
api.envNotRunning: Simulation environment not running or closed. Ensure simulation is complete and in command-wait mode.
api.historyTimeout: Loading history timed out, please retry later
api.concurrentSimQuota: You've reached the concurrent simulation limit ({limit}). Please wait for a running simulation to finish
api.interviewListInvalidPlatform: Interview list item {index} platform must be 'twitter' or 'reddit'
api.envRunning: Environment is running and ready for Interview commands

progress.waitingGraphProcess: Waiting for graph extraction to process data...
progress.waitingEpisodes: Waiting for {count} text chunks to process...
progress.generatingEventConfig: Generating event config and hot topics...
progress.graphSearchQuery: All information, activities, events, relationships and background about {name}
progress.resolvingEntities: Resolving entities: merging aliases of the same entity...

log.preparingGoBack: Preparing to return to Step 2, closing simulation...
log.closeSimEnvFailed: Failed to close simulation environment, attempting force stop...
log.timeConfigFetchFailed: Failed to fetch time config, using default: {minutes} min/round
log.buildTaskMissingGraphCompleted: Build task was not found, but the graph is already complete. Loading final graph.
log.buildTaskLostAutoResume: Build task {taskId} was lost (likely server restart). Auto-resuming build...
log.buildTaskMissingInterrupted: Build task {taskId} was not found and the graph is incomplete. The build was interrupted.
log.graphBuildTaskStarted: Graph build task started. Task ID: {taskId}
log.noPendingFilesRedirect: Error: no pending files found. Redirecting to home.
log.detectedExistingPrep: Detected existing preparation, using it directly
log.generatingLLMConfig: Calling LLM to generate simulation config parameters...
log.envSetupComplete: ✓ Environment setup complete, ready to simulate
log.resumingPrepare: ↻ Detected an in-progress preparation, resumed monitoring (no re-trigger)
log.oldSimCleared: ✓ Old simulation logs cleared, restarting simulation
log.resumingSim: ↻ Detected a running simulation, resumed monitoring (no restart, progress kept)
log.simAlreadyCompleted: ✓ Simulation already finished, loading final results
log.reportRequestSent: Report generation request sent, please wait...

report.sectionConflict: Section {title} round {iteration}: LLM output both tool call and Final Answer (conflict #{conflictCount})
report.sectionConflictDowngrade: Section {title}: {conflictCount} consecutive conflicts, downgrading to truncate and execute first tool call
report.multiToolOnlyFirst: LLM attempted {total} tool calls, executing only the first: {toolName}
report.sectionNoPrefix: Section {title} missing 'Final Answer:' prefix, adopting LLM output as final content (tool calls: {count})
report.sectionMaxIter: Section {title} reached max iterations, forcing generation
report.sectionForceFailed: Section {title} force-finish LLM returned None, using default error message
report.sectionGenFailedContent: (This section failed to generate: LLM returned empty response, please retry later)

console.graphSearchFallback: Graph search failed, falling back to local search: {error}
console.localSearchComplete: Local search complete: found {count} relevant facts
console.generateSubQueriesFailed: Failed to generate sub-queries: {error}, using defaults
console.callingBatchInterviewApi: Calling batch interview API (dual platform): {count} agents
console.interviewApiCallFailed: Interview API call failed (env not running?): {error}
console.llmSelectAgentFailed: LLM agent selection failed, using default selection: {error}

narrative.envReady: Cast and stage are ready — let's begin
narrative.engineStarted: The scene begins; characters start playing off each other
narrative.actingSub: Characters play the scene driven by their own motives as the story unfolds
narrative.actedSub: {{count}} beats in total; the story has reached this point
narrative.waiting: A character is about to speak…
narrative.branchTitle: God's-eye view: inject a variable and see the story rewrite itself
narrative.branchPlaceholder: e.g. an old letter arrives, a key witness shows up, the lead changes their mind…
